about.title: About
about.name: Alina Levandovska
about.lead: An artist working with acrylic and mixed media. My pieces try to capture stillness, light, and movement in everyday landscapes and abstract forms.
about.p1: I study and work in Ukraine. Every painting is made by hand — from the first brushstroke to the signature on the back of the canvas. Besides originals, I offer high-quality digital prints for anyone who wants art nearby in a practical format.
about.p2: I draw inspiration from the sea, morning light, the textures of old walls, and the simplicity of black-and-white graphics. If a piece resonates with you, I would be glad for it to find a place in your space.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Questions about artworks, shipping, or a custom commission? Write to me — I will reply soon.
contact.note: Orders are placed through the cart on this site. After you submit the form, I will contact you to confirm shipping and payment details.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Pick an artwork in the gallery, add the format you want to the cart, and leave your contact details at checkout. I will then get in touch with you.
No. The site does not take payments. We agree on payment and shipping personally after the order.
Shipping within Ukraine and abroad is arranged individually depending on the format (original or print).

items.q: Can I commission a custom piece?
items.a: Yes. Write via Telegram or email — we can discuss the idea, size, and timeline.
